---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new check, flag, or behavior
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What is the user need? Who hits it, and when?

## Proposal

A concrete description of the change. If you are proposing a new UF rule check, link the UF source (Graduate School Editorial Office page or `ufdissertation.cls` line range) that motivates the rule, and indicate the severity tier (`must-fix` / `review`).

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you weigh, and why is this one preferred?

## Scope check

- Is this in scope for v1.0 per [`docs/spec-v1.0.md`](../docs/spec-v1.0.md)?
- If not, is it a candidate for a soft-rule revisit, or for a later release?
